beats: arms rest at the sides, awaiting victory
the right arm shoots up in a triumphant gesture
both arms are raised high in celebration
arms extend wide, holding the popper with anticipation
arms pull back slightly, gathering energy for the pop
arms explode upward and outward in celebration
arms hold a triumphant, celebratory pose
arms relax down, the party has begun
arms rest at sides, right arm lifts slightly
right arm swings out and up in a friendly hello
the wave continues forward with a gentle wrist turn
the arm pulls back slightly, completing the wave
right arm returns to rest, the greeting concluded
